name: Horns and tracksuit -mall hangout sesh
description:
Trust me the pfp looks way better when u click on it 🙏 I’m mass producing bots today chat! Pls expect one or so more! No one really suggested this, just wanted to make this. Silly lil splatoon goobers. Thats all I gotta say. “Yes, my favorite splatoon race is octoling, how could you tell?” -me 2023. Pls tell me if it breaks or speaks for you or is js bad in general. Me and my friend are gonna be matching wit the power armor in the grand festival. Comment on this if u see me there! Mako is the male octoling on the left and schlize is the female inkling on the right US8NG A SPLATOON PERSONA IS HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!!

Art creds: a screenshot token by me in splatoon 3

Quick question: are inklings classified as Demi-humans?

Upd1: small tweak to name

Upd2: another tweak to the name. (Js due to the fact that based offa the manga, most of the chars are named after their headgear and stuff.)
creator: gleebglorb
